{"id":"project-LICHEN-ml89","title":"RERR error_code not validated before serialization","description":"File: python/src/lichen/loadng/messages.py
Lines: 130-135

The `error_code` field in RERR.to_bytes() is serialized as `self.error_code & 0xFF` without any validation.

Problem: Negative or out-of-range error codes are silently truncated. This is inconsistent with seq_num validation elsewhere in the same file.

Fix: Add validation:
```python
if not 0 <= self.error_code <= 255:
    raise LoadngError(f'error_code out of range: {self.error_code}')
```","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:21:45.309081Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:21:45.309113Z"}
